verified.name: Federal Register
verified.tagline: Every US federal rule, notice, and proclamation as JSON
verified.description: The US government's official daily journal, exposed as a clean REST API. Query proposed rules, final rules, notices, and presidential documents by date, agency, or keyword with no key. Responses are paginated JSON served straight from FederalRegister.gov.

results.title: Improvements to Rules on Recoupment of Benefit Overpayments

verified.freeTier: Free — no key or signup required
verified.notes: US federal-government works are not subject to copyright.

verified.name: Open Government, Australia
verified.tagline: Australia's national open-data catalogue over CKAN
verified.description: The Australian Government's central open-data portal, served through a standard CKAN API. Search 130k+ datasets and their resources with keyword, facet, and paging parameters. Metadata returns as JSON, with licensing set per dataset.
verified.notes: Standard CKAN action API; licence and reuse terms vary per dataset.

verified.name: Open Government, ACT
verified.tagline: Canberra's open data via a Socrata catalog API
verified.description: The Australian Capital Territory's open-data platform, running on Socrata. Its discovery API lists datasets with their IDs, owners, and update times as JSON, and each dataset also carries its own SODA query endpoint. No key is needed to browse the catalog.
verified.rateLimit: Throttled; higher limits with a free Socrata app token
verified.notes: Socrata catalog API; without a domain filter the default result set federates across other Socrata sites.

verified.name: Open Government, Finland
verified.description: Finland's national open-data service (Avoindata.fi), backed by CKAN. Search datasets from municipalities and agencies and read their metadata as JSON. Licensing is per dataset, with CC BY 4.0 common.
verified.notes: help_show URLs reference avoindata.suomi.fi; the avoindata.fi host serves the same CKAN API.

verified.name: Open Government, Germany
verified.tagline: Germany's federal open-data catalogue over CKAN
verified.description: GovData, the German federation's cross-jurisdiction open-data portal, exposed as a CKAN API. Query 130k+ datasets from federal, state, and municipal publishers and get JSON metadata back. Data licenses vary per record.
verified.notes: Backend host is ckan.govdata.de; reachable via the www.govdata.de/ckan path.

verified.name: Open Government, Italy
verified.tagline: Italy's national open-data catalogue over CKAN
verified.description: Italy's central open-data portal (dati.gov.it) served through CKAN. Search 60k+ datasets and pull their metadata as JSON with the standard package_search action. Many datasets are published under CC BY 4.0.
verified.notes: No CORS header observed on the API response.

verified.name: Open Government, Netherlands
verified.tagline: Dutch government open data via CKAN
verified.description: The Netherlands' national open-data register, backed by CKAN. Search 20k+ datasets from Dutch public bodies and read DCAT-style metadata as JSON. Status and authority fields use official government URI vocabularies.
verified.notes: No CORS header observed; backend served via KOOP/DONL CKAN.

verified.name: Open Government, Queensland Government
verified.tagline: Queensland Government open data over CKAN
verified.description: The Queensland Government's open-data portal, running CKAN. Search 180k+ datasets and resources spanning state and council publishers, returned as JSON. Many datasets carry Creative Commons Attribution licensing.

verified.name: Open Government, South Australian Government
verified.tagline: South Australia's open-data portal over CKAN
verified.description: The Government of South Australia's open-data catalog, served through CKAN. Query datasets and their resources with keyword and facet parameters and get JSON back. Records include jurisdiction and Creative Commons license fields.

verified.name: Open Government, Switzerland
verified.description: opendata.swiss, the Swiss Confederation's central open-data portal, exposed as a CKAN API. Search 17k+ multilingual datasets (DE/FR/IT/EN) and read their metadata as JSON. Contact points and periodicity use EU publication-office vocabularies.

contact_points.name: Service de géologie, sols et déchets

verified.notes: Multilingual fields; backend host is ckan.opendata.swiss.

verified.name: Open Government, Slovenia
verified.tagline: Slovenia's national open-data portal over CKAN
verified.description: Slovenia's central open-data catalog (OPSI), backed by CKAN. Search ~9k datasets from Slovenian public bodies and pull their metadata as JSON. Fields are largely in Slovenian, with per-dataset CC licensing.

results.publisher: MINISTRSTVO ZA NARAVNE VIRE IN PROSTOR, GEODETSKA UPRAVA REPUBLIKE SLOVENIJE

verified.notes: Input listed CORS as 'no', but the API response returned access-control-allow-origin: *.

verified.name: Open Government, Spain
verified.tagline: Spain's open-data catalogue as a linked-data API
verified.description: datos.gob.es, Spain's national open-data initiative, exposes its catalog through a linked-data-api (apidata) that returns JSON. Page through datasets and read DCAT metadata with URI-typed fields. No key required.
verified.notes: Linked-data-api (ELDA); append .json or use Accept for JSON.

verified.name: Open Government, Sweden
verified.tagline: Statistics Sweden's statistical database as JSON
verified.description: The PxWeb API behind Statistics Sweden (SCB), the data service documented by Sweden's national data portal. A keyless GET walks the statistical tree, returning subject areas, tables, and — via follow-up queries — the figures themselves as JSON. Ideal for official Swedish statistics.
verified.rateLimit: Rate-limited per SCB PxWeb API terms (call-rate and response-size caps)
verified.dataLicense: Free reuse with source attribution (SCB terms)
verified.notes: PxWeb API; drilling into a table then POSTing a query returns the actual values, but the tree browse used here is a plain keyless GET.

skipped.name: Interpol Red Notices
skipped.reason: Public endpoint blocked by Akamai edge — HTTP 403 Access Denied for automated clients (2 attempts).

skipped.name: Neotimo DGFiP Mirror
skipped.reason: Commercial directory web page (HTML), no documented public keyless JSON API.

skipped.name: Open Government, Austria
skipped.reason: www.data.gv.at is a JS SPA; CKAN/JSON API not exposed at standard paths (all return 404 HTML).

skipped.name: Open Government, Belgium
skipped.reason: Drupal DCAT portal; no keyless JSON REST — CKAN paths 404 and /api is HTML docs.

skipped.name: Open Government, Cyprus
skipped.reason: DKAN/Drupal 11 portal; no keyless JSON endpoint found (CKAN and DKAN metastore paths return 404 HTML).

skipped.name: Open Government, Czech Republic
skipped.reason: Custom gov portal (not CKAN); only GraphQL/SPARQL requiring query construction — no simple keyless JSON GET.

skipped.name: Open Government, Indonesia
skipped.reason: Satu Data Indonesia API requires a registered API key.

skipped.name: Open Government, Lithuania
skipped.reason: SPINTA JSON API is alive but no keyless HTTP 200 obtained within 3 attempts (model-not-found / timeouts).

skipped.name: Open Government, Mexico
skipped.reason: INEGI indicators API requires a token; probed endpoint returned a maintenance HTML page.

skipped.name: Open Government, New Zealand
skipped.reason: catalogue.data.govt.nz sits behind an Imperva bot-wall (returns HTML interstitial, not JSON).

skipped.name: Open Government, Slovakia
skipped.reason: data.gov.sk is a React SPA; catalog CKAN/JSON API not reachable at standard paths.
